# City-Wide Environmental Impact Report
## Week: 2025-06-03 to 2025-06-10

## Air Quality Summary (Average by City)
- Ahmedabad: PM2.5: 35.68, PM10: 48.41, NO2: 21.57, O3: 31.50 µg/mł
- Bangalore: PM2.5: 36.12, PM10: 48.94, NO2: 19.19, O3: 28.72 µg/mł
- Chennai: PM2.5: 34.66, PM10: 47.90, NO2: 19.43, O3: 28.03 µg/mł
- Delhi: PM2.5: 34.15, PM10: 45.86, NO2: 20.07, O3: 30.00 µg/mł
- Hyderabad: PM2.5: 36.67, PM10: 53.22, NO2: 19.35, O3: 28.57 µg/mł
- Jaipur: PM2.5: 36.45, PM10: 47.93, NO2: 20.09, O3: 29.34 µg/mł
- Kolkata: PM2.5: 34.09, PM10: 51.63, NO2: 19.77, O3: 28.46 µg/mł
- Lucknow: PM2.5: 35.68, PM10: 50.93, NO2: 19.23, O3: 30.26 µg/mł
- Mumbai: PM2.5: 33.38, PM10: 51.23, NO2: 20.24, O3: 29.72 µg/mł
- Pune: PM2.5: 35.48, PM10: 48.01, NO2: 20.03, O3: 30.92 µg/mł

## News Alerts
- High PM2.5 levels detected in Delhi, health advisory issued.
- Mumbai faces rising NO2 pollution from traffic, officials say.
